Catalog/Diagnostics/Merilisa Dengue IgM ELISA
DiagnosticsREF: DGMELI-01

Merilisa Dengue IgM ELISA

Meril Diagnostics · ELISA

Enzyme immunoassay for detection of IgM antibodies against Dengue virus. MAC-ELISA format. For confirmation of acute/recent dengue infection.

MaterialImmunoassay reagents
Frequently Asked Questions

Vircell Dengue IgM ELISA Assay delivers precise qualitative detection of Dengue IgM antibodies with 98% sensitivity and 99% specificity using advanced Mac technology. This CE-marked immunoassay reagent enables reliable early-stage dengue fever diagnosis in clinical laboratories. The robust ELISA-based testing platform ensures accurate serological screening for dengue virus infection, supporting timely patient management and epidemiological surveillance in healthcare facilities.

This product is manufactured by Meril Life Sciences and is distributed by Agile Healthcare across all districts of Telangana.

Yes, all Meril Life Sciences products distributed by Agile Healthcare, including the Merilisa Dengue IgM ELISA, strictly adhere to CDSCO guidelines and ISO 13485:2016 quality standards.

The Merilisa Dengue IgM ELISA is constructed using Immunoassay reagents, ensuring high biocompatibility and durability.
